name: Article Feed
description: Authenticated (`auth.jwt` middleware, viewer = `auth.sub`), so `favorited`/`author.following` are real per-row values, unlike list-articles' optional-identity gap. Articles authored by anyone the caller follows, same envelope shape and single-query author-join approach as list-articles (see its description for the `GROUP BY a.id, u.id` rationale).

config.query: SELECT a.slug, a.title, a.description, a.body, a.created_at, a.updated_at, a.author_id, to_json(COALESCE(array_agg(DISTINCT at.tag) FILTER (WHERE at.tag IS NOT NULL), '{}')) AS tag_list, (SELECT count(*) FROM favorites f WHERE f.article_id = a.id) AS favorites_count, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM favorites f WHERE f.article_id = a.id AND f.user_id = $1) AS favorited, u.metadata->>'username' AS username, u.metadata->>'bio' AS bio, u.metadata->>'image' AS image, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM follows fo WHERE fo.follower_id = $1 AND fo.followee_id = a.author_id) AS following FROM articles a LEFT JOIN article_tags at ON at.article_id = a.id JOIN auth_users u ON u.id = a.author_id WHERE a.author_id IN (SELECT followee_id FROM follows WHERE follower_id = $1) GROUP BY a.id, u.id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3
SELECT count(*) AS count FROM articles a WHERE a.author_id IN (SELECT followee_id FROM follows WHERE follower_id = $1)
